---
title: "cstar.js"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\bin\cstar.js"
loc: 25
complexity: 2
logic_score: 8.43
style_score: 6.86
intel_score: 7.80
overall_score: 6.19
---

## Intent
The `cstar.js` sector implements modular logic focusing on __dirname, PROJECT_ROOT, ENTRY_POINT, bootstrap. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via __dirname, PROJECT_ROOT, ENTRY_POINT, bootstrap. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 6.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.8/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 10 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [execa](file://execa)
- [fileURLToPath](file://node:url)
- [join](file://node:path)
- [*](file://dotenv)

### Exports
- `__dirname`
- `PROJECT_ROOT`
- `ENTRY_POINT`
- `bootstrap`
